description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint, featuring a light-colored exterior with horizontal siding and multiple large windows with decorative shutters. The front facade includes a main entrance with a small step and a set of windows symmetrically arranged on either side. A spacious garage is attached to one side, with a visible car parked inside and a wide driveway leading up to it. The roof is flat and extends over the entire structure, with a clear separation between the main living area and the garage. The rear of the bungalow features double glass doors opening onto a patio area, and the interior layout is divided into several rooms, including bedrooms, bathrooms, and communal spaces. The overall design is simple and functional, with a focus on accessibility and open living spaces.
description: A single-story, light-colored bungalow with a flat roof, attached garage, and large windows with shutters. The layout is open and accessible, with a prominent front entrance and rear patio doors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows with shutters, and the attached garage with a visible car.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the back entrance, patio area, and the separation between the garage and main living spaces.
description_view_2: Back view displaying double glass doors leading to a patio, with windows and the garage visible on the right.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the garage doors, parked car, and the arrangement of rooms along the side of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
